description.t: the finite cutoff used in the defining limit
description.p: exponent in a p-integral of the form integral x^(-p) dx
description.I: value of the improper integral (when it converges)
description.L: the limit that defines the improper integral
description.F: the antiderivative of f found before evaluating the finite-cutoff limit
description.u: substitution variable when a u-substitution is used before evaluating
